name: car-part-store
description: Car Part Store - WPF Desktop App + React Web App

scripts.dev: echo 'Run both apps in separate terminals:' && echo '  Terminal 1: npm run dev:wpf' && echo '  Terminal 2: npm run dev:web' && echo '' && echo 'Or use VSCode split terminal (Ctrl+Shift+5) and run each command in a pane.'
scripts.build:all: npm run build:wpf && npm run build:web
